identity.name: HamTabv1
identity.description: POTA/SOTA amateur radio dashboard — Node.js/Express backend, vanilla JS frontend, Leaflet maps, esbuild bundling

purpose: Two-deployment-mode amateur radio dashboard: hostedmode (hamtab.net via Cloudflare Containers) and lanmode (self-hosted on Windows/Linux/Raspberry Pi). DX cluster, propagation, satellite tracking, space weather, POTA/SOTA parks and summits.

status.summary: Feature-rich dashboard with two deployment modes. Automated CI/CD for hostedmode. Feature flag system for dev/test/release gating.

structure.src/: ES modules bundled to IIFE via esbuild
structure.public/app.js: Bundled client output — don't edit directly
structure.docs/user-guide/: PDF user guide content and build

hostedmode.notes: Cloudflare Containers + Worker + KV. Auto-deploy on push to hostedmode branch via GitHub Actions.

lanmode.notes: Self-hosted HTTPS with self-signed certs. systemd or NSSM service. Auto-update via GitHub Releases.

docker.notes: Docker image published to Docker Hub on GitHub Release. Multi-stage build.

security.auth_model: Lanmode: RFC 1918 CORS lock. Hostedmode: Cloudflare Access. Feedback emails RSA-2048 encrypted.
trust_boundaries: ALL outbound HTTP via secureFetch() — DNS pinning, SSRF prevention, timeouts, size limits
ALL user/API data rendered as HTML via esc() — XSS prevention
Never commit .env, TLS certs, or wrangler secrets

conventions: ES modules in src/, bundled to IIFE via esbuild
Server is stateless — no database, no sessions
Feature flags mandatory for all new user-facing features
Version lives in package.json — bump BEFORE commit
Imperative mood commit messages with mode indicator
hard_rules: Bump package.json version BEFORE commit — patch for fixes, minor for features
NEVER edit shared files directly on deployment branches — make changes on main and merge down
Pre-commit branch check MANDATORY — verify correct branch before every commit
Post-merge validation MANDATORY — node -c, duplicate detection, Dockerfile COPY check
ALL outbound HTTP must use secureFetch() — never raw fetch/https.get
ALL user/API data rendered as HTML must use esc()
No feature is complete without README, user guide, and widget help text updates
Wiki Release Notes entry required on every version bump
Feature flags required for all new user-facing features
